caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" on the chest is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is seated in a room decorated with numerous framed photos on the wall behind him and a white mannequin dressed in a white garment nearby. Clothing racks and a black chair are also visible in the background. Small logos, including one that says "THE SHIT," appear in the lower corners of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man is talking and gesturing with his right hand, which is raised in the first frame and lowers as the sequence progresses. His facial expression changes as he speaks, shifting from an open mouth while gesturing to a more closed, contemplative expression by the end.
